source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Readable documentation typography with crisp English UI labels, calm numerals, and multilingual guidance for Japanese product interfaces.
layout: Layered 8px grids, thin slate-edge dividers, compact navigation, steady dashboard surfaces, and restrained mineral-grain texture.

prompts.label: Transparent slate layers motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout
Primary request: Create only a compact specimen of wet quarry slate layers, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: a stratified slate rock cross-section with thin stacked layers, chipped angular edges, blue grey charcoal stone, subtle mineral green veining, damp quarry sheen, tactile cleaved planes, realistic slate texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the subject. The rock should read as layered slate, not a generic boulder.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural mineral color, damp highlights, and fine sediment lines.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Slate, derived from the visible wet quarry slate layer motif cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the slate motif: blue grey, charcoal, wet stone highlights, mineral green seams, layered cleaved planes. The board must visibly respect these motif colors.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, preferred 3840x2160 composition.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Slate", motif story "wet quarry / slate layers", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; choose font guidance for calm documentation system UI.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, calm documentation system, precise grid, 8px card radius, matte paper surfaces with wet slate mineral texture accents.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: pale mist #eef3f2, slate paper #dce5e4, blue grey #708087, mineral green #54705f, deep slate #253035, charcoal #151b1e.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no marketing hero layout.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the Slate design-system board. It must feel like the same wet quarry slate system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent slate motif and the visible light design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, and typography: blue grey, charcoal, wet stone highlights, mineral green seams, layered cleaved planes.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, preferred 3840x2160 composition.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Slate", "Dark Mode", motif story "wet quarry / slate layers", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Visual details: deep slate background #0e1315, card surface #151b1e, muted blue-grey panels #253035, light text from wet highlights #e6eceb, mineral green primary/accent #7f9b8e and #54705f, restrained contrast, subtle slate-layer texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, 8px radius.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, calm documentation system, precise grid, dark mode documentation UI.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no illegible text, no random brand names, no marketing hero layout, no watermark.
